parsed.production_notes: The presenter exhibits characteristics of an AI avatar, including unnaturally smooth skin, slightly stiff head movements, and lip-syncing that feels slightly disconnected. The video is a single, static shot, typical of AI talking-head generation.

characters.appearance: Young adult Indian woman, slim build, medium complexion. Straight dark brown hair parted in the middle. Prominent nose and defined jawline.
characters.wardrobe: Brown long-sleeved collared shirt. Small cross earrings.

scenes.setting: Dimly lit room, dark teal walls, desk, microphone, lamp.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits at a dark wooden desk in a dimly lit room with dark teal walls. She wears a brown long-sleeved collared shirt and small cross earrings. A black microphone on an articulated arm is positioned in front of her on the left. A black desk lamp with a warm light is visible in the background on the left, and a small framed picture hangs on the wall behind her. She holds a dark smartphone in her left hand. The lighting is soft and focused on her face.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter introduces the app while sitting at her desk. App UI overlays appear, showing a speech scanning process and her initial score. She speaks a phrase into her phone, and the app grades her pronunciation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I thought my English was pretty good until I found this app that showed me otherwise.
Character A says: A few months ago, I came across BoldVoice's SpeechScan.
Character A says: The first time I took the test, I came in at 75%.
Character A says: Goofy moves.
scenes.on_screen_text: ENGLISH APP OTHERWISE AGO BOLDVOICE'S SPEECHSCAN CAME 75% NEVER Grading your intonation... 79% Grading your fluency... 96% 100% Your Speech Level Maya 75% Practice My Text Coach Alice Let's begin! Record yourself saying the phrase below. Goofy moves 82% 68% moves M.OO.V.Z

scenes.visual_description: The presenter explains how the app helped her identify areas for improvement. Overlays display detailed analytics on pronunciation, intonation, and fluency, as well as examples of practice exercises.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I never realized what I was doing wrong.
Character A says: Then the app showed me the areas where I could improve, and I've been practicing every single night for like 10 minutes before bed.
scenes.on_screen_text: WRONG SHOWED WHERE AND PRACTICING SINGLE 10 TODAY Pronunciation 67 Good Intonation 93 Advanced Fluency 83 Great Word stress We found 2 words where you're stressing the wrong syllable. Intonation patterns to improve Compare how your intonation rises or falls differently from the coach's. flo-wers 80%

scenes.visual_description: The presenter takes a second test on her phone, speaking words into it. The app UI shows her improved score. She reacts with excitement and delivers a call to action, accompanied by the app's logo.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Today, I'm taking another SpeechScan, and we'll see how I do.
Character A says: Enthusiasm.
Character A says: Future.
Character A says: 91%!
Character A says: Try BoldVoice for free to see what you get on your SpeechScan.
